_comment: Species: Ink Dragon (墨龙) from Pursuit of the Truth. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Ink Dragon

canonical.appearance: Serpentine dragon 50 m, scales ink-black, breath extinguishes light
canonical.size: 50 m adult, 100000 jin; ancient 300 m, millions of jin
canonical.behavior: Solitary apex predator of ink caves; sleeps for centuries; hoards darkness treasures
canonical.habitat: Ink dragon caves, darkness-aspected apex spirit veins
canonical.diet: darkness herbs, ink bats, lost cultivators
canonical.relationships: Apex of ink caves; rival of flame dragon
canonical.bloodline: Ink-Dragon lineage; darkness-attribute true dragon bloodline (diluted)
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: ink_dragon — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
